data.name: lblTemplate.Help
data.value: Allows you to provide a custom template for displaying the items. Use parameters for dynamic substitution ( ie. [CONTENT] [CREATEDDATE] [CREATEDBYUSER] [CREATEDBYUSERNAME] )

data.name: PasteJSON.Text
data.value: Paste your JSON form element here

data.name: SendEmails.Text
data.value: Email Address Notified on Submission (one per line)

data.name: EmailTemplate.Text
data.value: Enter the message to be displayed before the form data in the email sent after a form is submitted

data.name: FontAwesomeCdnUrl.Help
data.value: The url to the CDN hosting the version of Font-Awesome requried

data.name: LoadFontAwesome.Help
data.value: If the site doesn't use Font-Awesome - check this box

data.name: LoadTwitterBootstrapJavascript.Help
data.value: Check to load the Twitter Bootstrap JS url

data.name: TwitterBootstrapCdnUrl.Help
data.value: The url to the CDN version of Twitter Bootstrap

data.name: TwitterBootstrapJsCdn.Help
data.value: The url for the Twitter Bootstrap JS cdn.

data.name: UseTwitterBootstrapCdn.Help
data.value: Check the box if the site skin doesn't already include Twitter Bootstrap CSS

data.name: SubmittedMessage.Default
data.value: Thank you for contacting us. We will be in touch shortly.

data.name: SubmittedMessage.Help
data.value: Enter a message to be displayed to the user after they submit the form.

data.name: SendEmailToUser.Help
data.value: Check this box to send a copy of the notification email to the user who filled out the form.

data.name: UseRecaptcha.Help
data.value: Enables the Recaptcha field. A valid site key and secret key must be supplied for Recaptcha to function properly.

data.name: FromEmail.Help
data.value: Enter the from email address to be used when sending email notifications via this form. Leave blank to use the default Portal Admin email address.

data.name: SalesForceCampaignID.Help
data.value: Optional field that allows for setting the campaign id this lead should be assigned to

data.name: SalesForceDebugMode.Email.Help
data.value: The email address that should receive debug messages

data.name: SalesForceLeadSource.Help
data.value: Text value to represent the lead source.

data.name: SalesForceOID.Help
data.value: The organization ID provided by Salesforce

data.name: SalesForceWebLeadUrl.Help
data.value: Url to submit to...provided by Salesforce

data.name: UseSalesForce.Help
data.value: If enabled, this will cause the form data to be submitted as a SalesForce.com lead

data.name: SalesForceCustomParamName.Help
data.value: Use this setting to set an arbitrary field name that will be passed to Sales Force

data.name: SalesForceCustomParamValue.Help
data.value: The custom parameter value. Requires the Custom Parameter Name field to be populated also.

data.name: KnockoutJsCdnUrl.Help
data.value: Enter the URL without the "http:" or "https:"

data.name: UseKnockoutJsCdn.Help
data.value: This module requires at least Knockout JS 3.0.0 This setting should only be enabled if the currently installed version DNN does not include at least Knockout JS 3.0.0

data.name: IncludeUserInfo.Help
data.value: Enable this setting to include basic user information values on the page. These can be used to autopopulate fields on the form for logged in users. Fields include: First Name, Last Name, Company, Email, Telelphone, Street Address, City, State, Zip, Country

data.name: IncludeUserInfo.Text
data.value: Include Basic User Info Object on Page

data.name: AfterSubmittedAction.Help
data.value: Select whether to show a message after submission or redirect to a different page.

data.name: RedirectURL.Help
data.value: Enter the path to the page the form should redirect to after submission (this will only be used if the "After Submit Action"is set to "Redirect".

data.name: EmailFormatStyle.Help
data.value: Choose the way the fields should be displayed in the email. "Standard" will render each field (label and value) on a single line. "Table"will render field labels and values in a simple table format.

data.name: FileUploadFolder.Help
data.value: Select the folder where file uploads should be placed

data.name: IgnorePostBackInMainView.Help
data.value: Select this option to override the PostBack check during Page_Load of the View.ascx code-behind file. This is to help ease situations where another module might conflict with this one (e.g., using ASP.NET MultiView controls).

data.name: CWTracking.Help
data.value: Enables/Disables Connectwise tracking for Foremost Use

data.name: UseRecaptchaInvisible.Help
data.value: Requires configuration on key setup to be invisible

data.name: EmailTemplate.Default
data.value: A new form entry has been submitted. View the form module page to review current submissions.

data.name: FormData.Default
SubmitCallback.Help
data.value: Javascript function to call upon form submit in format namespace.object.function. Ex: globalObject.element.myFunction

data.name: UseKnockoutValidation.Help
data.value: Enable this setting if Host Settings >CDN Settings > Use Javascript Libraries CDN is enabled, otherwise form with double verify.

data.name: ExternalReplyTo.Help
data.value: Defaults to 'Email From Address'. This is the email used in the ReplyTo field of the email sent to users on form submission if 'Send Email To User' is selected.

data.name: InputEmail.Help
data.value: Defaults to input with Name(Id) of Email. Otherwise you can override which input should be considered the email field.

data.name: InternalReplyTo.Help
data.value: Defaults to email input, or above override. This is the value set in the ReplyTo field of the emails sent to 'Email Address Notified' field.

data.name: FileUploadRoles.Help
data.value: File are encrypted and only viewable to selected roles. Changing this will update all folders for this module instance.

data.name: FileUploadRoles.Text
data.value: Select Roles with File View Permissions

data.name: FilesNeedUpgrade.Text
data.value: The module has been upgraded to require secure folders for storing file uploads. If you are seeing this message, then existing files need to be reviewed and upgraded to secure storage where appropriate. All new uploads will be automatically secured, but this upgrade requires a one-time file upgrade process. Go into the module settings and select the Upgrade Upload Folders option. This message will continue to appear until the process has been run.

data.name: UpgradeFiles.Help
data.value: Only necessary if warned on form page. This will review all form folder with file uploads and change their permission from "Standard" to "Secure" to prevent url navigation.

data.name: FilesAsAttachments.Help
data.value: Determines if files should be passed as attachments in internal notifications emails. Otherwise it will produce a secure file link. If notifications emails are sent to people who do not need any authorization, this option should be choosen or file view permissions can be set for all users.

data.name: TrackGoogleUrlCodes.Help
data.value: Check the box if you want to enable Site Marketing Session Data (utm_source, utm_campaign, gclid, etc.)

data.name: TrackGoogleUrlCodes.Text
data.value: Enable Site Marketing Session Data (Track Google URL codes)

data.name: GoogleUrlCodeMsg.Text
data.value: Please verify the CookiesTheme SkinObject is inserted into your skin.

data.name: RecaptchaReposition.Help
data.value: Reposition the reCAPTCHA badge (BottomRight / BottomLeft / Inline)

data.name: IncludeWebPageSubmittedFrom.Help
data.value: Option to include what webpage the form is being submitted from (include host value, uri, and query string.)

data.name: IncludeWebPageSubmittedFrom.Text
data.value: Include what webpage the form is being submitted from?

data.name: SalesForceWebCaseUrl.Help
data.value: Url to submit to...provided by Salesforce
